_description: EPA Victoria Publication 1826.5 - Tables A.1 to A.4
_source: Noise limit and assessment protocol for commercial, industrial and trade premises and entertainment venues
_lookup_logic: 1. Get zone_code (e.g. SUZ1, GRZ, IN1Z) from VicPlan at receiver location
3. For schedule-specific zones (SUZ, CDZ, UGZ, ACZ, PDZ with a number):
a. If receiver is in metro Melbourne: check table_a2_metro_overrides for LGA + zone_code match
b. If receiver is in a major urban area (table_a3): check table_a4_regional_overrides for LGA + zone_code match
c. If found: use the override type and description
d. If not found: use table_a1_defaults for the base zone code (CDZ->2, UGZ->1, ACZ->2)
4. For standard zones (GRZ, IN1Z, etc): use table_a1_defaults directly

table_a1_defaults.description: Public Use Zone - Other Public Use
